description.overview: Italy's truffle-hunting dog, the Lagotto has a distinctive curly coat and keen nose. They're loving, active companions with a hypoallergenic coat.
description.history: The Lagotto Romagnolo originated in Italy.
description.temperament: Known for being keen, loving, undemanding.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their dense, curly, woolly coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Italy's truffle-hunting dog, the Lagotto has a distinctive curly coat and keen nose. They're loving, active companions with a hypoallergenic coat.
